# SELFIE AI™ Agent + Copilot Workflow

## How to Apply Agent Code:
1. Open the target file (or create new)
2. Type: // Agent: [Dev AI/UX AI/etc] provided this:
3. Paste the agent code below the comment
4. Copilot will help format and integrate it
5. Review and commit

## Quick Commands:
- Create file: Type "// create" at the top of a new file
- Update function: Navigate to function, type "// update with agent code"
- Add imports: Type "// import" and Copilot suggests
